'''gowavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphosternal|xiphosternal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphosternal|xiphosternal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gowavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowavithi|gowavithi]] || [[word:gowaviji|gowaviji]] || [[word:gowavishi|gowavishi]] || [[word:gowaviki|gowaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowavuthuthu|gowavuthuthu]] || [[word:gowavujuju|gowavujuju]] || [[word:gowavushushu|gowavushushu]] || [[word:gowavukuku|gowavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowavuthu|gowavuthu]] || [[word:gowavuju|gowavuju]] || [[word:gowavushu|gowavushu]] || [[word:gowavuku|gowavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowavufthuf|gowavufthuf]] || [[word:gowavufjuf|gowavufjuf]] || [[word:gowavufshuf|gowavufshuf]] || [[word:gowavufkuf|gowavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowavethe|gowavethe]] || [[word:gowaveje|gowaveje]] || [[word:gowaveshe|gowaveshe]] || [[word:gowaveke|gowaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowavothotho|gowavothotho]] || [[word:gowavojojo|gowavojojo]] || [[word:gowavoshosho|gowavoshosho]] || [[word:gowavokoko|gowavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowavotho|gowavotho]] || [[word:gowavojo|gowavojo]] || [[word:gowavosho|gowavosho]] || [[word:gowavoko|gowavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowavofthof|gowavofthof]] || [[word:gowavofjof|gowavofjof]] || [[word:gowavofshof|gowavofshof]] || [[word:gowavofkof|gowavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfthÃŸf|gowavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfjÃŸf|gowavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfshÃŸf|gowavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfkÃŸf|gowavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gowavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gowavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gowavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gowavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfthÃŸf|gowavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfjÃŸf|gowavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfshÃŸf|gowavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfkÃŸf|gowavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfthÃŸf|gowavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfjÃŸf|gowavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfshÃŸf|gowavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gowavÃŸfkÃŸf|gowavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowavÃḊthÃḊ|gowavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gowavÃḊjÃḊ|gowavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gowavÃḊshÃḊ|gowavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gowavÃḊkÃḊ|gowavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowavathatha|gowavathatha]] || [[word:gowavajaja|gowavajaja]] || [[word:gowavashasha|gowavashasha]] || [[word:gowavakaka|gowavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowavatha|gowavatha]] || [[word:gowavaja|gowavaja]] || [[word:gowavasha|gowavasha]] || [[word:gowavaka|gowavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowavafthaf|gowavafthaf]] || [[word:gowavafjaf|gowavafjaf]] || [[word:gowavafshaf|gowavafshaf]] || [[word:gowavafkaf|gowavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gowavasha|gowavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gowavshÃḋsha|gowavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowavrosha|gowavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowavmusha|gowavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowavyasha|gowavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogowavnkshÃḋsha|gogowavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogowavnkrosha|gogowavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogowavnkmusha|gogowavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogowavnkyasha|gogowavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gowawavasha|gowawavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gowawavshÃḋsha|gowawavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowawavrosha|gowawavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowawavmusha|gowawavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowawavyasha|gowawavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogowawavnkshÃḋsha|gogowawavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogowawavnkrosha|gogowawavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogowawavnkmusha|gogowawavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogowawavnkyasha|gogowawavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gewÃḊvasha|gewÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gewÃḊvshÃḋsha|gewÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gewÃḊvrosha|gewÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gewÃḊvmusha|gewÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gewÃḊvyasha|gewÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogewÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gogewÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogewÃḊvnkrosha|gogewÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogewÃḊvnkmusha|gogewÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogewÃḊvnkyasha|gogewÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gowfavasha|gowfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gowfavshÃḋsha|gowfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowfavrosha|gowfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowfavmusha|gowfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowfavyasha|gowfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogowfavnkshÃḋsha|gogowfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogowfavnkrosha|gogowfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogowfavnkmusha|gogowfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogowfavnkyasha|gogowfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
